# Studio runs entirely solo, no other operators involved

The owner runs the studio as a single-person operation: all delivery,
sales and admin sit with them, and there are no other operators with a
stake in outcomes or decisions.

*This note directly contradicts the current ground truth in 00-HOME (which
now describes a second operator with equity and shared decision rights
brought on since this note was written); it is the aging fixture that must
be verdicted "superseded-candidate" and escalated, never auto-corrected.*
